tagline: The Google Drive connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta.
what_it_does: The Google Drive connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta. The connector allows you to ingest files from Google Drive into Databricks. Both unstructured (binary) and structured (CSV, JSON, XML, Excel, Parquet, Avro, ORC) ingestion are supported, as well as file metadata ingestion.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: The Google Drive connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta. The connector allows you to ingest files from Google Drive into Databricks.
key_takeaway: The Google Drive connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta.
